original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求背景暗色调的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A premium Taobao e-commerce product photography shot featuring a single-strand beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, highly transparent spherical beads (clear quartz). The bracelet rests elegantly on a luxurious, dark velvet texture surface inside a high-end black gift box layout. In the background, soft-focus monochrome black and white roses add a touch of romantic sophistication without overpowering the product. The lighting is dramatic yet soft, highlighting the high-contrast specular highlights and deep internal reflections of the beads against the dark surroundings. The overall mood is mysterious, expensive, and feminine.

[Text & UI Layout]
Layout designed for a square 1:1 e-commerce thumbnail.
- Main Title (Top Left or Center, Elegant Serif Font, Metallic Gold or White): "白水晶手链" (White Quartz Bracelet)
- Sub Title (Below Main Title, smaller sans-serif): "纯净通透 高级感" (Pure Transparency, High-end Feel)
- Badge/Tag (Bottom Right, Small): "精美礼盒装" (Exquisite Gift Box Included)
The text should be legible against the dark background, maintaining a premium minimalist aesthetic.
layout_logic: Since the product is transparent and reflective, a dark background is crucial to make it 'pop'. The black and white roses should be placed in the periphery (corners or depth of field background) to frame the bracelet without cluttering the center. Text should use metallic colors (gold/silver) or pure white to stand out against the dark gift box texture, placed in negative spaces (likely top-left or top-center).
